labels.name: epic
labels.description: Tracks a body of work with sub-issues

overview_blocks.title: Scope
overview_blocks.body_md: Reuse the existing **session store**; only the refresh flow is new.

overview_blocks.title: Auth flow
overview_blocks.source: graph LR; A[Login]-->B[Issue JWT]; B-->C[Refresh]; C-->B

epics.title: Authentication & sessions
epics.summary_md: Add token refresh so sessions survive past the access-token TTL.

issues.title: Add refresh-token endpoint
issues.functional_md: A signed-in user stays signed in: when the access token expires, the app silently gets a new one instead of bouncing the user to the login screen.
acceptance: An expired access token is transparently refreshed
A revoked refresh token forces re-login
issues.technical_md: Add `POST /api/auth/refresh` in `server/auth/refresh.ts`. Validate the refresh token against the new `sessions` table (migration `0005_sessions.sql`), rotate it, and return a new JWT. Reuse the existing `signJwt()` in `server/auth/jwt.ts`.
